title: xylorhiza senescens
intro: Xylorhiza senescens, also known as the four-winged saltbush, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Xylorhiza senescens are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Xylorhiza senescens can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
